message:
feat(setup): Integrate tool registry for dynamic display info

Enhance the Setup page to use tool registry metadata for richer display:

- Add toolMap prop threaded through DetectStepContent for registry lookup
- Pass registryTool to ToolCard components for registry-aware rendering
- Update ToolCard to prefer getToolDisplayInfoFromRegistry() when available,
  falling back to static getToolDisplayInfo() for backwards compatibility
- Determine isAgent status from registry category field when available

This enables dynamic tool display (icons, descriptions, categories) to be
driven by the tool registry API rather than a hardcoded static map,
supporting extensibility as new tools are added to the platform.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
